markets.no_sub_title: Rodrigo Gomes: 1+
markets.rules_primary: If Rodrigo Gomes records at least 1+ goals during the entire game (regulation, stoppage and any extra time periods) of the Liverpool vs Wolverhampton professional EPL soccer game originally scheduled for Mar 3, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to a player in the entire game (regulation, stoppage and any extra time periods) of the Liverpool vs Wolverhampton professional EPL soccer game originally scheduled for Mar 3, 2026. If a player is active but never enters the game, the market settles to the last fair market price before game start. Once a player enters the game, the market settles based on the player's goals scored.
